---
title: "Presentations"
subtitle: "Interactive Slide Decks & Revealjs Presentations"
---

These slide decks were developed using Quarto and Revealjs, allowing for dynamic, code-driven storytelling and interactive data visualizations.

```{=html}
<div class="features-grid" style="margin-top:2rem;">

  <div class="feature-card">
    <div class="feature-icon-box">
      <i class="bi bi-easel"></i>
    </div>
    <h3>Advanced R Programming</h3>
    <p><strong>Module 12 Reflection</strong><br>
    Insights into advanced programming concepts, functional programming, and efficient R code.</p>
    <a href="rendered/m12-reflection.html" class="btn-hero-primary" target="_blank">View Slides</a>
  </div>

  <div class="feature-card">
    <div class="feature-icon-box">
      <i class="bi bi-layers"></i>
    </div>
    <h3>Advanced Data Types</h3>
    <p><strong>Module 08 Reflection</strong><br>
    An exploration of complex data structures in R, including lists, data frames, and factor management.</p>
    <a href="rendered/m08-reflection.html" class="btn-hero-primary" target="_blank">View Slides</a>
  </div>

  <div class="feature-card">
    <div class="feature-icon-box">
      <i class="bi bi-people"></i>
    </div>
    <h3>Data Wrangling & Analysis</h3>
    <p><strong>Group 3 Project</strong><br>
    A comprehensive presentation on the data wrangling process, analysis methodologies, and final findings.</p>
    <a href="rendered/group3-analysis.html" class="btn-hero-primary" target="_blank">View Slides</a>
  </div>

</div>
```
